name: Severe District Floods
description: Heavy monsoon rains have caused rivers to breach embankments, flooding rural villages and destroying standing crops.

options.text: Divert state grid backup power to city centers (-2 Coins)
Ignore the disaster to save fiscal reserves (0 Coins)

name: IT Cell Leaked Documents
description: A whistleblower leaks audio files exposing your party's online IT cell coordinating fake smear campaigns against opponents.

options.text: Apologize, dismantle the cell, and fire the director (-4 Coins)
Deny all allegations and label the audio files as deepfakes (0 Coins)
Launch a counter-leak targeting opposition leadership (-5 Coins)

name: State Board Exam Leak
description: Board examination papers are leaked online, triggering state-wide protests by angry students and youth organizations.

options.text: Cancel exam and fund a secure digital re-examination (-6 Coins)
Order a police crackdown to clear the protest venues (-3 Coins)
Form an inquiry committee to delay acting (0 Coins)

name: Factory Workers Strike
description: Trade unions call for an indefinite strike at manufacturing hubs, bringing local transport and production to a halt.

options.text: Negotiate and agree to higher state minimum wages (-5 Coins)
Declare transport utilities essential to break the strike (-2 Coins)
Let manufacturers negotiate without state intervention (0 Coins)

name: Controversial Feature Film
description: A film depicting regional history triggers street demonstrations by local community groups demanding a ban.

options.text: Ban the film to maintain local public order (-3 Coins)
Deploy security forces to theaters to defend free speech (-6 Coins)
Decline to interfere and let theater owners decide (0 Coins)
